data.title: UTStarcom Reports Unaudited Financial Results for Second Half and Full Year 2025
data.description: UTStarcom, a leading global provider of telecommunications infrastructure, has released its unaudited financial results for the six months and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol UTSI, is headquartered in Hangzhou, China. Additionally, UTStarcom has offered a business update alongside this financial report.

data.title: MATIC aims for $0.45 as RSI hovers at 38. Currently trading at $0.38. Technical analysis hints at potential recovery.
data.description: The MATIC cryptocurrency is currently trading at $0.38, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 38. Analysts indicate a possible recovery to $0.45 if the current support level remains stable, despite bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD).

data.title: Cardinal Health to Announce Third-Quarter Results for Fiscal Year 2026 on April 30
data.description: In Dublin, Ohio, on March 24, 2026, Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) announced their intention to unveil their third-quarter financial results for the fiscal year 2026 on April 30, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. A live webcast discussing the results will also be accessible.

data.title: Energy Giant Equinor Expands Brazil Renewables Footprint
data.description: Equinor ASA (NYSE: EQNR) announced the acquisition of the 230-megawatt Esquina do Vento onshore wind project from Vestas Wind Systems A/S, expanding its power portfolio in Brazil. Located in Rio Grande do Norte, the project comprises 51 wind turbines and will be developed by Equinor's subsidiary, Rio Energy, with expectations of double-digit returns. Forecasted to produce approximately 1 terawatt-hour of power annually, this wind complex will significantly boost the region's energy capacity. By integrating wind, solar, and energy trading within the market, Equinor aims to enhance grid utilization, reduce intermittency, and ensure robust returns. Through its energy trading unit, Danske Commodities A/S, Equinor will sell the power generated by the project. Highlighting Brazil as a strategic market for their long-term growth, this deal aligns with Equinor's market approach and signifies a step forward in bolstering their presence in the region.

data.title: Dr. Chidebelu Ufodike Named Chief Operating Officer of New Jersey Urology, an Affiliate of U.S. Urology Partners
data.description: In VORHEES, New Jersey, Dr. Ufodike has been appointed to oversee the operations of the New Jersey Urology clinical network. This network comprises over 20 offices that deliver advanced urology and cancer care services throughout the state.

data.title: Yimutian Inc. Provides 2026 Strategic Update: Financing on Track, Management to Purchase No Less Than US$3 Million in Company Shares, Full-Year Revenue Expected to Reach RMB 1 Billion
data.description: The board and management have reiterated their confidence in the long-term value of the company. They have put in place a twelve-month lock-up period and a formal repurchase program to demonstrate their continued alignment with shareholders. These measures show their commitment to supporting shareholder interests and ensuring sustained growth of the company.

data.title: Lieutenant General Laura Potter, USA (Ret.) Joins Academy Securities’ Advisory Board and Geopolitical Intelligence Group
data.description: New York-based investment bank, Academy Securities, known as the first of its kind to be owned and operated by Post-9/11 veterans, has welcomed Lieutenant General Laura Potter to its Geopolitical Intelligence Group. This division of Academy Securities comprises 43 distinguished members, including US and UK Admirals & Generals, former NASA Astronauts, and former CIA/FBI Leadership. With over a decade of experience, Academy serves as a leading advisory on geostrategic risk in the market. The recent addition of Lieutenant General Laura Potter further enhances the expertise and knowledge base within the Academy GIG, solidifying its position as a top player in the industry.

data.title: Vertical Aerospace Advances Piloted Flight Testing, Manufacturing and Demand for Valo
data.description: In a recent announcement from London and New York, Vertical Aerospace, a leading global aerospace and technology company specializing in electric aviation, unveiled its 2025 Annual Report. The report contains the financial outcomes for FY25, along with details on the ongoing flight test program, advancements in manufacturing, and commercial developments. Interested parties can access the Annual Report on the Company’s Investor Relations platform and at www.sec.gov. To provide further insights, Vertical will conduct a webcast today at 08:30 Eastern Time (12:30 Greenwich Mean Time), spearheaded by Ch.

data.title: Trane Technologies Exceeds DOE Heating Capacity Requirements in Commercial Building HVAC Technology Challenge
data.description: Trane Technologies, a leading global climate solutions provider, has accomplished all necessary laboratory tests for its rooftop units (RTUs) in the 10-14 and 15-25 ton capacity categories, which were submitted for the U.S. Department of Energy's (DOE) Commercial Building HVAC Technology Challenge. The company has also been singled out by the DOE for surpassing the optional heating capacity requirements on the smaller RTU, further demonstrating its commitment to innovation and efficiency. Trane Technologies, listed under NYSE as TT, continues to enhance its offerings to meet and exceed industry standards.

data.title: Expro to Deliver Geothermal Well Testing Services for Groundbreaking Lionheart Project in Germany
data.description: Expro (NYSE:XPRO) in Houston has secured a contract to provide well testing services for the initial Schleidberg well in Vulcan Energy’s Lionheart Project. This project is a notable geothermal and lithium extraction endeavor in Europe and has been recognized as a crucial initiative under the European Union’s Critical Raw Materials Act. The Lionheart Project stands as one of the most substantial programs for geothermal and lithium extraction in Europe. This collaboration aims to fortify the geothermal and lithium sectors in the region.
